roa.docketEntryComment: Order of Victim Restitution or CR-110 & Abstract of Judgment for Restitution (CR-111)

/CAL: RESTITUTION HEARING/DAWT/CTORD: PREVIOUSLY ORDERED RESTITUTION FROM02-24-21 VACATED/X: DEFENSE COUNSEL AND COUNSEL FOR THE PEOPLE HAVE ENTERED INTO A STIPULATION AS TO RESTITUTION OWED TO THE VICTIM IN THIS CASE, PURSUANT TO THE STIPULATION, RESTITUTION IS TO BE SET AT $9500,00 PAYABLE TOTHE VICTIM HUNG CHI HUYNH   PLUS 10% INTEREST PER YEAR (PC '1202,4(F)(3)(G)), AND AN ADMINISTRATIVE FEE OF UP TO 15% (PC '1203,1(1)), /X: THE COURT ORDERS THE DEFENDANT TO PAY RESTITUTION,/X: CR-110 AND CR-111 SIGNED AND FILED/X: DEFENDANT REFERRED TO ROOM 101 TO PAY RESTITUTION THROUGH THE COURT'S COLLECTION UNIT/X: WITH IN THE NEXT THREE (3) WEEKS/CCU/

/CAL:VICTIM RESTITUTION HEARING/X:THE DEFENDANT & VICTIM STIPULATE TO RESTITUTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,025,00 TO BE PAID TO VICTIM HUNG CHI HUYNH/CCU//X:A CR-110 & 111 ARE SIGNED & FILED IN OPEN COURT/CONTPROB/

/CAL:TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING/DAWT/CTORD:RESTITUTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $10,339,75 IS PAYABLE TO THE VICTIM, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/X:CR-110 AND 111 ARE FILED/CCU/CONTD:TO SET ON REMAINING VICTIM HUNG CHI HYUNH/DOPU:WITH ATTORNEY AUTHORITY/

/CAL:RESTITUTION DETERMINATION/DAWT/X:REPORT INDICATES ONE VICTIM, CITY AND COUNTY OF SF IS REQUESTING $10,339,75/CTORD:GENERAL ORDER OF RESTITUTIONAS TO HUNG CHI HUYNH & CORY MCDOWELL/CONTD:TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING/DOPU:WITH ATTORNEY AUTHORITY/

/CAL  SENTENCING/TWS/CH5 ISS CPROB PROB 18 M PJ 1D/CTS  1/4019HALF/PF14518/FOP1: 12 HOUR/LCHEM/LVAL/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CITE/EMAT/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X: PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X: 23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/X: MATTER ISREFERRED TO APD RESTITUTION UNIT FOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION,/RESTRPT: 04-20-20/CONTD:APD MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT INDEPARTMENT 30/DOPU: APD/

/CAL  DISPOSITION/X THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADCOUNT #5, VC 23103, A MISDEMEANOR (WITHIN THE MEANING OF 23103,5 VC),/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 5/DISM3/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/DAWT/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL HAS 977 AUTHORITY/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TODEMURR,/GTWM/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/SB:2HR/
